Hours of Operation:

Monday - Saturday
: 8am - 2pm

Private Dining & Events
Whatever your event or celebration, we are here to help make it truly memorable. Sun in my Belly has been bringing glorious food to private dinners and events for over 20 years and it’s something that we absolutely love to do. Whether you dine at our restaurant or invite us into your home/event space, we’d love to be a part of your experience. INQUIRIES take no time at all to fill out and the information will help us know how we can help you best.
Inquire Here
Contact Us
Have questions about the menu? Feel free to reach out via phone at (404) 370-1088 or email us at info@suninmybelly.com.
Contact us
*Sun In My Belly does not accept reservations, seating is first come first served.
Rental space is available any day after 5pm. Please
contact our Catering department
for more information.
